mapper.select: /* oms-item-itemgroup-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOmsinMstIcgrxct */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.INSERTDATE , A.UPDATEDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEURKEY , C.CLOSDATE , A.ICGRPKEY , C.ICGRPNM , B.CTKEY , B.CTNM , A.OWKEY , A.ICGRPTYPE , C.IFYN FROM TORDER_MST_ICGRXCT A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND B.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICGR C ON A.ICGRPKEY = C.ICGRPKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY WHERE A.ICGRPKEY = #{icgrpkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey}
/* oms-item-itemgroup-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOmsinMstCt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,CTKEY ,CTNM FROM TORDER_MST_CT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y'

/* oms-item-itemgroup-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkItemGroup */ SELECT A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.ICGRPTYPE ,A.ICGRPNM ,A.ICGRPKEY ,A.CLOSDATE ,A.OWKEY --,B.MASTERUPDATEIMPOS AS FN_GET_MASTER_IMPOS --,A.SAMFILENM FROM TORDER_MST_ICGR A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_OW B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICGRPKEY = #{icgrpkey} AND A.ICGRPTYPE = #{icgrptype}
